title: Hook
description: Bring a maneuverable grappling hook to minecraft.
body:
Hook Mod for Minecraft  

Overview  
This mod introduces a dynamic hook system in Minecraft, allowing players to throw a hook and be pulled towards it. If the player presses the key again, the hook retracts. This mod enhances mobility and offers an exciting way to navigate the world.  

Features  
Throw and Pull Hook:  
Players can throw a hook using a designated key.  
The hook pulls the player towards the hooked position.  
Press the key again to retract the hook.  

Dynamic Movement:  
Increased player movement while using the hook.  
Dynamic response to WASD and jump keys, simulating swinging and upward boosts.  
![Hook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QfYt206n/images/bcad6afd4bb9bf788c942d5688e6d7661518a958.png)
